meta.notes: Case-specific expectations for regression gates. This file does not redefine global specs; it binds expectations to this case.

mapping_rules.readme_tag_policy: Every expectation item MUST reference README tags via ref.readme_tag (and optionally ref.readme_item).

invariants.notes: Execution must not fail. This is a governance-level gate.

metrics.notes: Replace with real numeric metrics in v0.3+ (e.g., L2 error, energy norm, residual). Template keeps structure only.

artifacts.notes: Dataset must be produced only via export step. This checks the exported output directory structure.

dataset_semantics.notes: Optional: machine-readable description of dataset fields/units. Keep empty unless needed.

sensitivity.notes: Optional: expected sensitivity trends (mesh refinement, timestep, parameter perturbation). Usually not a hard gate.
